title: Senior Health Checkups
description: Comprehensive health checkups designed specifically for seniors aged 60 and above. Regular screenings for blood pressure, diabetes, cholesterol, vision, and hearing.
eligibility: Valid Aadhaar or government-issued ID required
No prior enrollment needed for basic checkups
benefits: Home visit option for mobility-limited seniors
steps: Call the helpline or visit the nearest PHC / community health center
Bring your Aadhaar and any existing medical records
Complete a brief health questionnaire
Get your checkup scheduled within 48 hours
Receive your results and follow-up plan

contact.address: Govt. Community Health Centre, Andheri West, Mumbai 400058

faqs.question: Is there a cost for the health checkup?
faqs.answer: Basic annual checkups are free for all seniors aged 60+ at government health centers. Private referrals may have a nominal fee.

faqs.question: Can I get a home visit instead?
faqs.answer: Yes! Seniors with limited mobility can request a home visit. Call our helpline to schedule one.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my appointment?
faqs.answer: Please bring your Aadhaar card, any health insurance card (ABHA, Ayushman Bharat), list of current medications, and recent medical records.

title: Mental Health & Counseling
description: Confidential counseling and mental health support services for seniors dealing with depression, anxiety, grief, isolation, or life transitions.
eligibility: No referral needed for initial consultation
steps: Contact our mental health helpline
Speak with a trained intake coordinator
Schedule your first session (in-person, phone, or video)
Meet with a licensed counselor
Develop a personalized support plan

faqs.question: Is my information kept confidential?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All sessions are confidential and comply with Indian healthcare privacy regulations.

faqs.question: Can I attend group sessions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer various group therapy sessions including grief support, anxiety management, and social connection groups.

title: Home-Delivered Meals
description: Nutritious, freshly prepared meals delivered directly to your doorstep. Special dietary accommodations available for diabetic, low-sodium, and heart-healthy needs.
eligibility: Homebound or have difficulty preparing meals
No income requirements for basic service
Doctor's note required for medical diet plans
steps: Call the Meals Helpline or apply online
Complete a brief needs assessment
Choose your meal preferences and dietary needs
Delivery begins within one week of approval
Adjust your plan anytime by calling us

faqs.question: Can I choose my meals?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can select from our weekly menu. We accommodate dietary restrictions including diabetic, low-sodium, vegetarian, Jain, and more.

faqs.question: Is there a delivery fee?
faqs.answer: There is no delivery fee. Meals are provided at no cost to qualifying seniors.

title: Community Dining Programs
description: Enjoy nutritious meals in a friendly social setting at local community centers and old age homes. A great way to stay connected while eating well.
eligibility: No reservation needed for most locations
steps: Find your nearest community dining site
Visit during meal service hours
Register with a simple sign-in form
Enjoy your meal and the company
Ask about additional programs available

contact.address: Multiple locations across major Indian cities

faqs.question: Do I need to sign up in advance?
faqs.answer: Most locations welcome walk-ins, but calling ahead helps us prepare the right amount of food.

faqs.question: Is transportation available?
faqs.answer: Yes, many locations offer free auto or van service. Call your local dining site for details.

title: Senior Transportation Service
description: Safe, reliable door-to-door transportation for medical appointments, grocery shopping, social activities, and essential errands.
steps: Call to register as a new rider
Provide your address and mobility needs
Book your ride at least 24 hours in advance
Be ready 10 minutes before pickup time
Pay the flat fare to the driver

contact.address: Senior Seva Transport Hub, Shivaji Nagar, Pune 411005

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 24–48 hours in advance. Same-day rides may be available but are not guaranteed.

faqs.question: Are the vehicles wheelchair accessible?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our vehicles are equipped with wheelchair ramps and secure fastening systems.

title: Senior Legal Aid Services
description: Free and low-cost legal assistance for seniors on matters including wills, power of attorney, property disputes, elder abuse, pension claims, and consumer protection.
benefits: Help with wills and power of attorney
Elder abuse protection under Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act
steps: Call the Legal Aid Helpline
Describe your legal concern
Get matched with a panel advocate
Attend your consultation (in-person or phone)
Receive follow-up support as needed

contact.address: District Legal Services Authority, Dindoshi, Mumbai 400097

faqs.question: Is there a cost for legal help?
faqs.answer: Initial consultations are free under NALSA. Extended services are available through Legal Services Authorities at no cost for eligible seniors.

faqs.question: Can you help with elder abuse cases?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide legal advocacy under the Senior Citizens Act and connect you with protective services immediately.

title: Financial Assistance Programs
description: Programs to help seniors manage finances, access pension benefits, apply for assistance with utilities, rent, medications, and other essential expenses.
eligibility: Must provide Aadhaar and proof of residence
benefits: Old Age Pension (Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme)
Medication cost programs under Jan Aushadhi
Free rail and bus travel concessions
steps: Call or visit our Financial Assistance office
Bring income documentation, Aadhaar, and BPL card if applicable
Complete a benefits screening
Get connected to eligible government schemes
Receive ongoing support for applications

contact.address: Social Welfare Office, CGO Complex, New Delhi 110003

faqs.question: What documents do I need?
faqs.answer: Please bring your Aadhaar card, proof of income, bank passbook, BPL card (if applicable), and any current bills you need help with.

faqs.question: Can you help me enroll in Ayushman Bharat?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our benefits counselors help with Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY), IGNOAPS, and other government scheme enrollments.

title: Companion Care & Visits
description: Friendly companion visits for seniors who live alone or feel isolated. Companions provide conversation, light activities, errands, and emotional support.
eligibility: Living alone or with limited social contact
steps: Call or submit an online request
Tell us about your interests and needs
We match you with a trained companion
Begin weekly visits within two weeks
Provide feedback to improve your experience

contact.address: HelpAge India, Qutub Institutional Area, New Delhi 110016

faqs.question: How are companions screened?
faqs.answer: All companions undergo background checks, training, and are matched based on shared interests and personality.

faqs.question: Can I request a specific schedule?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with you to find a schedule that fits your routine and preferences.

title: In-Home Care Services
description: Professional in-home care assistance including personal care, medication management, mobility support, and skilled nursing for seniors who prefer to age in place.
eligibility: Doctor's referral may be needed for skilled nursing
Assessment required for level of care
Available with private pay or insurance
steps: Contact us for a free in-home assessment
A care coordinator visits your home
We create a customized care plan
Care begins with a matched aide
Regular reviews and plan adjustments

faqs.question: Does insurance cover in-home care?
faqs.answer: Many health insurance plans cover certain in-home services. Ayushman Bharat and some state schemes also provide coverage. We help you understand your options.

faqs.question: Can I change my caregiver?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Your comfort is our priority. We'll work to find the best match for you.

title: Assistive Devices & Equipment
description: Access to mobility aids, hearing devices, vision aids, and daily living equipment to help seniors maintain independence at home.
eligibility: Income-based assistance available under ADIP scheme
benefits: Free or subsidized devices under ADIP scheme
Home safety equipment (grab bars, shower seats)
steps: Get a referral from your doctor if needed
Contact our Assistive Devices team or nearest ALIMCO center
Complete a needs assessment
Receive your device with training
Follow up for adjustments or replacements

faqs.question: Are devices free?
faqs.answer: Many devices are available free under the ADIP (Assistance to Disabled Persons) scheme for eligible seniors. Private insurance may also cover prescribed devices.

faqs.question: Do you offer training on how to use devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, every device comes with hands-on training and follow-up support.

title: Personal Emergency Response
description: Wearable personal emergency response systems that connect seniors to help at the push of a button, 24/7.
eligibility: Living alone or at risk of falls
No income requirements for basic devices
steps: Call to request a personal emergency device
Choose your device type (home or mobile)
Receive and set up your device
Test the device with our monitoring center
Wear it daily for peace of mind

faqs.question: How quickly will help arrive?
faqs.answer: When you press the button, our monitoring center responds within 30 seconds and dispatches help via 112/108 immediately.

faqs.question: Does it work outside my home?
faqs.answer: Our mobile devices with GPS work anywhere with cellular coverage across India.

title: Caregiver Support & Respite
description: Support programs for family caregivers including respite care, training, counseling, and support groups to prevent burnout.
steps: Contact our Caregiver Support line
Share your caregiving situation
Get a personalized support plan
Access respite care and resources
Join a caregiver support group

faqs.question: What is respite care?
faqs.answer: Respite care provides temporary relief for caregivers. A trained professional takes over caregiving duties so you can rest, run errands, or take a break.

faqs.question: Are support groups available online?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both in-person and virtual support groups to fit your schedule.
